output.schema_yml_content:
version: 2

models:
  - name: fct_ticket_sales
    description: >
      Fact table capturing individual ticket sale transactions.
      Each row represents a single ticket sale with pricing,
      venue, and buyer information.
    columns:
      - name: ticket_sale_id
        description: Unique identifier for each ticket sale transaction.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - unique
      - name: event_date
        description: Date of the event for which the ticket was sold.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: venue_id
        description: Foreign key to the venue dimension where the event takes place.
        tests:
          - not_null
          - relationships:
              to: ref('dim_venue')
              field: venue_id
      - name: buyer_id
        description: Foreign key to the buyer who purchased the ticket.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: section_name
        description: Name of the seating section (e.g., Orchestra, Mezzanine, Balcony).
      - name: quantity
        description: Number of tickets in this sale transaction.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: sale_price
        description: Sale price of the ticket in the transaction currency.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: currency_code
        description: ISO 4217 currency code for the sale price (e.g., USD, GBP, EUR).
        tests:
          - not_null
          - accepted_values:
              values: ['USD', 'GBP', 'EUR', 'CAD', 'AUD']
      - name: created_at
        description: Timestamp when the sale record was created.
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: updated_at
        description: Timestamp when the sale record was last updated. May be null if never updated.

decision_log.decision: Generated schema.yml with 10 columns, 12 tests total
decision_log.rationale: Applied testing standards: not_null on all non-nullable columns, unique on PK (ticket_sale_id), relationships on FK (venue_id), accepted_values on currency_code. Nullable columns (section_name, updated_at) have no not_null test.
